title: Software Engineer
description:
**Job Description**
 Works in the area of Software Engineering, which encompasses the development, maintenance and optimization of software solutions/applications.
   

  

* Applies scientific methods to analyse and solve software engineering problems.
* He/she is responsible for the development and application of software engineering practice and knowledge, in research, design, development and maintenance.
* His/her work requires the exercise of original thought and judgement and the ability to supervise the technical and administrative work of other software engineers.
* The software engineer builds skills and expertise of his/her software engineering discipline to reach standard software engineer skills expectations for the applicable role, as defined in Professional Communities.
* The software engineer collaborates and acts as team player with other software engineers and stakeholders.


**Job Description \\- Grade Specific**
 Is the entry level in Software Engineering with a foundational understanding on programming concepts, software design and software development principles. Consistently works to direction with reducing supervision, producing accurate and reliable results. They are expected to be eager to learn and know when to ask questions and check for understanding. Understands and follows work processes. Is aware of costs related to own work. Organises own time to deliver against tasks set by others with a short term horizon. Works co\\-operatively with others to achieve team goals and has a direct and positive impact on project performance. Actively seeking feedback to improve and starting to manage own career with support.

title: Test Engineer
description:
**Job Title:** 
 Test Engineer
 



**Location:** 
 Bangalore
 



**Experience:** 
 3\\+ Years
 



**Education:** 
 Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical / Electronics Engineering
 



 Role Overview
 



 The Test Engineer will be responsible for developing and executing test solutions for oscillator products including TCXO and DCXO. The role involves ATE test program development, improving test efficiency, debugging test issues, and implementing automation for production testing.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 Test Development
 


* Develop and maintain test plans and test methodologies for oscillator products (TCXO, DCXO).
* Define test coverage and characterization strategies for production and validation.



 ATE Test Program Development
 


* Develop and maintain test programs on ATE platforms such as Eagle, UltraFlex, and Advantest 93k.
* Support new product introduction (NPI) and production test program release.



 Test Optimization
 


* Improve test efficiency through:
* Test time reduction
* Parallel testing techniques
* Optimization of ATE resources.



 Debugging \\& Issue Resolution
 


* Debug failures during characterization and production.
* Work with design, product, and manufacturing teams to resolve test issues.



 Automation \\& Scripting
 


* Develop scripts to automate test flows, data collection, and analysis.
* Improve test infrastructure through automation and tooling enhancements.



**Required Technical Skills** 




 Semiconductor Test Expertise
 


* Understanding of oscillator testing (TCXO, DCXO) or similar analog / mixed signal devices.
* Experience with ATE based semiconductor testing.



 ATE Platforms
 



**Hands\\-on Experience With One Or More** 



* Teradyne UltraFlex
* Teradyne Eagle
* Advantest V93000 (93K)



 Programming / Automation

title: System Application Engineer
description:
Description: System Application Engineer (Staff/Senior Staff )
   

  

 Location: Bengaluru , India
   

  

**About Us**
 We are a fast\\-growing Indian startup focused on developing innovative sensor\\-based systems for cutting\\-edge applications. We are very strong on materials, electrochemistry, physics, pure sciences and have deep engagement and understanding of our customer’s requirements. Competing against the other global behemoths, we have carved a niche for our Hydrogen Sensor product line in the international market with our patented technologies. Our mission is to push the boundaries of our technologies by creating high\\-performance Analog Front\\-End (AFE) data acquisition systems for sensors and impedance measurement solutions. While we are building a strong team to progress our cutting edge sensing technologies on a MEMS platform (close engagement with premier research institutions in India), we are now focussing on developing in\\-house electronics chip building capabilities. We’re looking for a passionate and self\\-driven System Application Leadto join our dynamic team and take ownership of critical design challenges. The Company has recently secured a healthy Seed Round of funding and has also been approved for the Design Linked Incentive scheme of MeitY, which shall fuel our next stage of growth.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 As a System Application Engineer (staff/senior staff) you will be the technical face of our next\\-generation Gas Sensing Solution employing our state of the art MEMS Sensor and Analog Front\\-End (AFE) chip family. You will take ownership in translating high\\-level customer problems into complete, production\\-ready reference designs. Drawing on deep mixed\\-signal expertise, you will create evaluation boards, application notes, design tools and in\\-field demos that accelerate customer design\\-in and showcase our Gas Sensor \\+ AFE SoC’s competitive edge. Your insights will directly shape product and silicon road\\-maps and go\\-to\\-market collateral
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own the reference design strategy where you will define, architect and deliver PCB \\+ firmware reference designs that solve real customer use\\-cases for Gas Sensing Applications.
* Engage with end\\-customers to distil application requirements, performance gaps and emerging trends.
* Collateral creation – author application notes, user guides, BOMs, schematics, simulation models and embedded drivers
* Design, bring\\-up and validate evaluation boards; implement automated test scripts for performance verification
* Capture field learnings, benchmark competition, and feed quantitative data back to marketing \\& design
* Present at webinars, industry forums and author technical blogs to position our Gas Sensing Solution as the reference platform


**What We’re Looking For**
* B.Tech/M.Tech/Ph.D. in EE/ECE with 8\\+ years experience in system applications engineering for mixed\\-signal ICs and sensing solutions. with at least one end\\-to\\-end AFE, data\\-acquisition or sensor\\-interface product in volume production
* Proven track record creating reference designs/eval boards and associated collateral for tier\\-1 customers
* Expert knowledge of analog signal\\-chains (ADC/DAC, PGAs, low\\-noise amps, sensor excitation), embedded MCU/RISC\\-V or ARM subsystems, and precision power supplies
* Hands\\-on proficiency with PCB design, lab instrumentation, scripting (Python/LabVIEW), and C/C\\+\\+ firmware
* Strong customer\\-facing communication skills and ability to convey complex trade\\-offs to both executives and design engineers
* Experience in industrial or automotive sensor systems with strict EMC/EMI and safety compliance


**Nice To Have**
* Familiarity with IEC 61010, IEC 60079, ISO 13485 or IEC 61508, ISO 26262 functional\\-safety flows
* Knowledge of sensor technologies (e.g., MEMS, piezoelectric, or capacitive sensors).
* Digital signal processing (DSP) , AI/ML techniques for sensor data processing.


 Why Join Us?
   

  

* Lead the system\\-level vision for a Gas Sensing Solutions that will anchor multiple vertical platforms.
* Influence product and silicon road\\-maps while remaining deeply hands\\-on with hardware, firmware and real customer problems.
* Be a key player in an innovative Indian startup shaping the future of sensor technology.
* Competitive compensation, ESOP , and a vibrant work culture.

title: Web Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 BeeBark is a digital platform designed to revolutionize architectural commerce and professional networking within the design and construction industry. We empower architects, builders, interior designers, and real estate developers by providing tools to showcase their work, attract high\\-quality clients, and grow their professional networks. BeeBark addresses industry challenges such as talent visibility and collaboration inefficiencies through customized digital solutions, strategic advertising, and content\\-driven engagement. As we expand, we aim to simplify hiring processes and build a trusted network for professionals and companies to discover and collaborate. Our vision is to create an integrated ecosystem merging architectural commerce, service discovery, and real estate activities.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is a part\\-time, remote Web Developer role at TheBeeBark. The Web Developer will be instrumental in designing, developing, and implementing web applications that are both visually appealing and highly functional. The role requires a proactive individual capable of handling both front\\-end and back\\-end development tasks to support the company's digital presence. Responsibilities include converting design mockups into responsive websites, supporting website maintenance, troubleshooting technical issues, and continuously enhancing the functionality of digital tools to meet user needs. The developer will work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including designers and project managers, to ensure seamless integration of features that align with BeeBark’s mission of connecting architectural professionals through innovative digital solutions. This role offers flexibility and an opportunity to contribute to a dynamic startup environment while working remotely.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Candidates should possess a strong foundation in web development with experience in building custom websites both on the frontend and backend. Familiarity with drag\\-and\\-drop platforms such as Webflow, Wix, WordPress, Shopify, and Framer is essential. The ability to convert Figma designs into pixel\\-perfect websites is a key skill. Candidates must be comfortable deploying and managing hosting environments and handling revisions efficiently, demonstrating independence and minimal need for supervision.
   

  

* Build custom websites (frontend \\+ backend)
* Work with drag\\-and\\-drop platforms (Webflow, Wix, WordPress, Shopify, Framer etc.)
* Convert Figma designs into pixel\\-perfect websites
* Deploy and manage hosting environments
* Handle revisions and client iterations efficiently
* Work independently with minimal hand\\-holding


 Core technical skills required include proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and experience with React or Next.js (preferred). Knowledge of backend technologies such as Node.js or PHP is necessary, along with API integration experience and responsive design implementation. Additional skills in performance optimization, basic SEO, version control (Git), and hosting platforms (Vercel, cPanel, AWS basics) are considered advantageous.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The successful candidate will be responsible for a range of tasks that support the company’s digital initiatives. Key responsibilities include developing and maintaining websites, ensuring responsiveness across devices, and optimizing performance for speed and efficiency. The developer will collaborate with designers to translate visual concepts into functional websites and work with project managers to meet deadlines. Regularly updating existing websites, troubleshooting issues, and implementing new features to enhance user experience are integral aspects of the role. Additionally, managing hosting environments and ensuring website security and stability are critical responsibilities. The role also involves staying updated with the latest web development trends and techniques to continuously improve the company's digital assets.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At TheBeeBark, we value our team members and offer an environment conducive to growth and learning. As part of our team, you will gain exposure to a real agency setting, working on diverse projects that enhance your skills and portfolio. There is significant potential for career advancement, with opportunities to grow into a Tech Lead role as you demonstrate your capabilities. You will have the chance to work directly with the founder, gaining insights into the startup ecosystem and entrepreneurial mindset. Our performance\\-based growth model ensures that dedicated and high\\-performing individuals are rewarded accordingly. We foster a flexible work environment that encourages innovation, autonomy, and professional development.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 TheBeeBark is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse team fosters creativity, innovation, and better problem\\-solving, and we are dedicated to providing equal opportunities for all applicants and employees.

description:
**This job is with Amazon, an inclusive employer and a member of myGwork – the largest global platform for the LGBTQ\\+ business community. Please do not contact the recruiter directly.**
**Description**
 Love sports? Want to change the world? Prime Video is re\\-inventing the live sports experience by merging high\\-quality live streaming, immersive interactive features, and exclusive access to some of the world's most loved sports properties \\- including the NFL, NBA, English Premier League and UEFA Champions League soccer, Rolland\\-Garros (French Open), the US Open and more. Every day we face the challenges of a fast\\-paced market and expanding technology set. And we're building at a scale only Amazon is capable of. The Prime Video Sports team is a single\\-threaded\\-owner, uniquely positioned to execute our vision across the entire Prime Video stack to deliver the most compelling new experiences to our customers. If this sounds like the type of experience you'd like to help build \\- apply here and let's chat!
   

  

**Who We Are**
 We are deeply connected with the idea that live sports events are fundamentally different: there is only one shot at delivering the moment until it is forever lost. Our mission is to make sure that our customers never miss a single moment of the sports they love. To do this we need to deliver best\\-in\\-class live sports infrastructure, testing, monitoring, and operations to optimize the delivery of live sports experiences at scale. Our team engineers for speed, quality, availability, and scale. As Prime Video has grown, we've increased the depth and breadth of video products we support, with a corresponding increase in the associated size and complexity of our engineering activity and the load on our services. Our goal is to adapt our architecture to maintain and improve our velocity of delivery for customers in the face of these changes, and for our services to be on and error\\-free 24/7, especially for high\\-profile, exclusive content. With AI as a transformative force, we're at an inflection point that enables us to unlock new opportunities in predictive analytics, automated defect analysis and mitigation, and automated operations that were previously beyond our reach.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
 We are looking for an experienced Software Development Engineer that's excited to build innovative technologies that define the future of live streaming. Successful candidates for this position demonstrate ability to multi\\-task, quickly adapt to new development environments and changing business requirements, learn new systems, create reliable/maintainable code, find creative and scalable solutions to difficult problems, and ability to communicate clearly and concisely both written and orally. If you are the one that's excited about entrepreneurial thinking, creating technology solutions for complex problems we want to hear from you.
   

  

**What You Will Do Here**
 You will provide technical leadership and vision to the experiences and services teams. You will ensure that the best engineering practices are followed and that our software is designed to be responsive, reliable, and maintainable. You will work closely with other teams in Prime Video and Amazon to architect solutions that will scale to hundreds of millions of customers.
   

  

**What You Will Get From Us**
 A great team to work with and the chance to build a top tier services at a proven top tier company. You will get a startup like culture with the stability of an established industry leader. You will get support and resources from some of the smartest people in the industry to continue learning.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**

title: Associate Principal Engineer - DevOps
description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

 This Position reports to:
   

  

 R\\&D Global Unit Lead
   

  

  

  

  

  

**What We Believe In**
 ABB delivers top\\-tier solutions for the energy industry segment. We have a multidisciplinary team located in centers around the world cooperating on product development. At the heart of ABB’s strategy is software\\-led differentiation and the Internet of Things, Service and People (IoTSP).
   

  

 This role will be reporting to the R\\&D Line Manager in business area Industrial Automation (IA) located in Bangalore. You will be working at Ability Innovation Center (AIC), home to the largest technology and engineering pool in ABB globally and is a part of ABB Global Industries and Services Private Limited, a subsidiary of ABB. It is based in Bangalore, the silicon\\-valley of India. Its unique infrastructure places research, development, engineering, and service teams under one roof, increasing collaboration and reducing time to market, with no compromise on quality.
   

  

 You will join a team of accomplished engineers to lead and develop advanced industrial control applications for the energy services industry. You will make substantial contributions to project outcomes in technology and product development by identifying, proposing, and implementing innovative solutions. Collaborating with teams in Norway, Sweden and Germany, the breadth of technologies and control strategies employed is broad. We are looking for someone who is technically very strong. The chosen professional should be motivated to operate in a worldwide, high\\-intensity, and stimulating workplace and can expect notable career development and fair pay along with company care for employees. Opportunities will be available to develop their career in the future.
   

  

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will have the chance to initiate and lead technology, software, product, or solution development using deep technical knowledge in a focused area. Each day, you will act as the first point of contact in Research and Development (R\\&D) for in\\-depth product or technology\\-related issues. You will also demonstrate your technical leadership by supporting strategic corporate technology management and shaping future product, software, and solution architectures.
   

  

 The work model for the role is: Hybrid
   

  

**You will be mainly accountable for:**
* Design, develop, and maintain scalable and stable infrastructure solutions to support reliable system performance and operational efficiency.
* Automate operational tasks using scripting and appropriate tools, and develop infrastructure automation solutions with a focus on Kubernetes environments and workload orchestration across multiple deployments.
* Manage and maintain CI/CD pipelines to streamline development, integration, and deployment processes while ensuring efficient DevOps practices.
* Monitor KPIs and system performance, deliver technical assistance for infrastructure\\-related issues, and work with software developers to enhance application performance.
* Ensure security and compliance with project policies, stay updated with the latest DevOps methodologies, and maintain proper documentation of environment configurations and custom scripts..


**Qualifications for the role:**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field with 4–6 years of development experience in .NET Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field with 4–6 years of development experience in .NET Core, CI/CD, and PowerShell, along with exposure to DevOps engineering on web platforms and technical quality control processes.
* At least three years working as a DevOps Engineer with demonstrated experience in Kubernetes and cloud platforms like Microsoft Azure, including implementation and deployment of Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) through the Azure Portal.
* Proficiency in scripting languages such as Python and Bash, along with experience in configuration management tools like Ansible, Puppet, or Chef, and containerization technologies including Docker, Kubernetes, and Podman.
* Solid grasp of Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools like Terraform, with practical experience in CI/CD pipelines and Helm Charts for deploying containerized applications.
* Practical experience deploying multi\\-cloud, multi\\-tenant systems with high\\-availability designs, and solid background in Git\\-centered development workflows using Azure DevOps and GitHub, covering repository management and integrations.
* Experience integrating DevSecOps tools such as SonarQube, Metadefender, Trivy, Netsparker, and BlackDuck, with exposure to PKI, code signing processes, and cybersecurity compliance tools and practices.
* Cloud certifications (e.g., Azure/AWS Certified DevOps Engineer), along with demonstrated communication, leadership, collaboration, and stakeholder management capabilities, readiness to operate in demanding environments, and fluency in English (written and verbal)


**More About Us**
 ABB is a major provider of power and automation technologies. Our solutions improve the efficiency, productivity and quality of our customers’ operations while minimizing environmental impact. Innovation is at the forefront of what we do and many of the technologies that drive modern society were developed by ABB.
   

  

 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.
   

  

 Recruitment Fraud Warning
   

  

 ABB never asks for payment from job applicants. All genuine job offers follow a formal application and interview process.
   

  

 View current job openings and apply at: https://careers.abb/global/en/home
   

  

 For more information, read our full fraud warning notice at: https://global.abb/group/en/careers/how\\-to\\-apply/fraud\\-warning
